name: 7.3 - Camera Movement — LearnWebGL
snippet: Tilt rotates a camera's view up or down . Pan rotates the camera's view horizontally about the camera's eye location. Truck moves a camera's location laterally ...

name: Camera movement -pan -tilt -truck/dolly -crane/boom
snippet:
DOLLY - camera moves in/out . Tilt: Using a tripod or even hand held you can tilt the camera left, right, up and down.
camera moves completely to the left/right PAN - camera pivots left or right TILT. Commonly used camera move are Pan, tilt, dolly,track, ...

name: Most people treat every camera move like it's just a “pan”, but
snippet: Most people treat every camera move like it's just a “ pan ”, but filmmaking has a real language, and AI now depends on you knowing it.
